slingshot_memory.content: Indian stock AI agent project uses a BYOLLM pattern in llm_provider.py with OpenAI Agents SDK; Mistral provider uses https://api.mistral.ai/v1 base URL.
Project has a fallback helper _call_mistral_with_fallback in llm_provider.py that rotates MISTRAL_API_KEY_PRIMARY/SECONDARY/TERTIARY on 429 errors only.
Indian stock AI agent: _is_rate_limit_error in llm_provider.py handles Mistral's exact error body format: {raw_status_code: 429, type: 'rate_limited', code: '1300'} via exc.body dict inspection.
Indian stock AI agent: _call_mistral_with_fallback uses print() with flush=True AND logger for key slot logging; format: '[Mistral] Attempting request with PRIMARY key'.
